title: Invite lifecycle and auto-resolve on signup
description: Implement the full project_invites status lifecycle (pending/accepted/declined/revoked) plus automatic resolution of pending invites to an unregistered email the first time that email completes signup/login via the Phase 2 Authentik flow.
acceptance_criteria: Recipient can accept or decline a pending invite; owner can revoke a pending invite before acceptance
A declined invite can be re-sent (a new invite, not a resurrected old one) without id/status conflicts
The Phase 2 (FEATURE-1020) OIDC callback checks for pending invites matching the newly authenticated email and resolves invitee_user_id automatically on first login
Revoking an invite after it has already been accepted has no effect on an already-created clone (see FEATURE-1052) — revocation only blocks future acceptance
State transitions are logged/auditable (resolved_at populated on every terminal transition)
notes: See docs/adr/0006-project-sharing-invites-and-cloning.md. This feature is the integration point between EPIC-105 and EPIC-102 called out in ADR-0006's Consequences section.
